text.title: Cost Anomaly Runbook Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the Cost Anomaly Runbook methodology end-to-end. Each step declares input, action, output, and decision-gate.

step.name: scope-anomaly
step.action: Pin the anomaly to a single service / line item / region.
step.decision-gate: If anomaly spans > 1 service, split per service.

step.name: attribute-cause
step.action: Attribute to deploy / config change / traffic shift / unit-rate change.
step.decision-gate: If no candidate attribution, mark as `unknown` and escalate.

step.name: compose-record
step.action: Emit decision record with rationale citing the change log entry.
